case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY VS. EMELINE PAGURAYAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE TRUST 2007-AR7, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-AR7 UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED APRIL 1, 2007, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT PAGURAYAN, EMELINE PAGURAYAN, HENRY DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PREJUDGMENT CLAIM, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE TRUST 2007-AR7, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-AR7 UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED APRIL 1, 2007, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST SERVED JUN-11-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAGURAYAN, EMELINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE TRUST 2007-AR7, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-AR7 UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED APRIL 1, 2007, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGURAYAN, EMELINE PAGURAYAN, HENRY DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 11 LEO STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE TRUST 2007-AR7, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2007-AR7 UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED APRIL 1, 2007, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PAGURAYAN, EMELINE PAGURAYAN, HENRY

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAGURAYAN, EMELINE PAGURAYAN, HENRY DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE
